description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build wheel that runs on every push to the main branch. The workflow should have three jobs: Make SDist, Build wheels on multiple OS, and Build wheels for manylinux_aarch64. The Make SDist job should check out the code, set up Python 3.8, install build and twine, build a source distribution, and upload it as an artifact. The Build wheels job should run on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest, install cibuildwheel, build wheels, and upload them as artifacts. The Build wheels manylinux_aarch64 job should set up QEMU, install cibuildwheel, build wheels for aarch64, and upload them as artifacts.
